title: tengine.session.client_disconnected v1
description: An IPC client disconnected (EOF or read error). Producer: tengine silo_tester via the registry handle SESSION_CLIENT_DISCONNECTED in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/event_registry.rs. CloudEvents subject is 'session_{session_id}'. agent_id is the empty string for clients that never sent an identify command.

client_idx.description: slot index of this client in the silo's connection table

session_id.description: monotonic per-silo client session counter; mirrored in the CloudEvents subject as 'session_{n}'

agent_id.description: agent identifier supplied via a prior identify command; empty string if the client disconnected before identifying

connected_frame.description: GPU frame index when the connection was accepted

disconnected_frame.description: GPU frame index when the disconnect was observed

frames_held.description: disconnected_frame minus connected_frame; convenience for consumers

occupancy.description: number of clients still connected to the silo socket after this disconnect
